steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: The key signal is the contrast: the data were inaccessible, but a project made them something. The blank needs a word for the opposite of inaccessible — something meaning accessible or usable.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Available means accessible or usable, the logical outcome when a data transfer project succeeds. The other options don't fit: they describe unrelated qualities or contradict what a successful project accomplishes. That matches choice C — C is correct.
